## Nvidia Discloses 9.3% Equity Stake in Nebius Neocloud; NBIS Stock Surges

NVDA taking equity in a neocloud provider shifts the strategic framing from vendor to ecosystem builder; this pattern, if repeated, could accelerate third-party GPU cloud buildout under the NVDA umbrella and is worth watching for similar moves with other neocloud or inference players.

- Nvidia has disclosed a 9.3% equity stake in Nebius (NBIS), a neocloud GPU compute provider.
- NBIS shares surged sharply on the disclosure.
- The stake signals NVDA is building strategic equity positions in the GPU cloud ecosystem beyond direct GPU sales.
- Coverage from CNBC and MSN confirms the disclosure is market-moving and widely reported.
